guide:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Malethai Crimsonhand  
Speak to Crimsonhand, the Guildmaster. You are sent to pick up a **Recruit's Shield** from **Merchant Olkan**. Return to Crimsonhand.  
**430 XP**

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Malethai Crimsonhand  
Crimsonhand sends you to **Spiritmaster Keika**, who binds you and sends you to **Coachman Ronks**. You are signed into the ledger; return to Crimsonhand.  
**2,200 XP**

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Stolfson Krieger  
Report to Stolfson, upstairs from Crimsonhand near the exit. To prove your worth, he wants you to seek out and slay **Orc Pawns**. Exit the north gate (by the Blacksmith) and head north-northwest to find them. Return to Stolfson with **two slashed pawn belts**.  
**6,900 XP** & **Malice** scroll

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Stolfson  
Bring Stolfson the following items to make a new weapon:

- **Iron Ore + Wooden Staff** — **Merchant Shohan** (Bazaar near the Blacksmith)  
- **Sliver of Snake Meat** — Farm any snake

Return to Stolfson with the supplies.  
**17,000 XP** & **Iron Hatchet Robe**

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Stolfson  
The roads are plagued by highwaymen. Exit by the Blacksmith (north), follow the road, then head right to a grassy hill with a druid stone. Kill the highwaymen, loot their goods, and return to Stolfson.  
**36,500 XP** & **Heavy Arms** scroll

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Malethai Crimsonhand  
Villagers in Temby report an Elf wandering into town. Travel to Temby and slay the squire **Janxt** (**CONs Yellow @7**). Loot her idol and return to Crimsonhand.  
**157,474 XP** & **Shadow Tunic** scroll, receive **Damaged Shield of Hate**

---

# Level 10

**Quest NPC:** Malethai Crimsonhand  
Crimsonhand sends you to **Hodstock** north of Freeport to infiltrate the Novandear gang. Follow the riverbank north to the broken bridge. Wait until night in Tunari for Novandear to appear. Weak bandits around the ramps are light blue and blue @ lvl 10; other Novandear members con yellow. Kill bandits until **Nanik Novandear** appears.  
Slay Nanik and retrieve his eye. Return to Crimsonhand.  
Purchase **lantern oil** from **Merchant Landi** (n/e of the bank) for 296 tunar; return to Crimsonhand.  
**556,753 XP** & **Blade of the Nanchael**

---

# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Crimsonhand  
Deliver a **bag of coins** to **Agent Wilkenson** at the docks. Take the note from Wilkenson to **Duminven** in **Saerk's Tower** (Kithicor Forest). Follow the Highpass Trade Route and climb the hill east of the second guardtower.  

Deliver the note to Duminven. He instructs you to head southeast into Bastable, locate **Eliene**, follow her, then kill her and her contact. Return to Duminven, then back to Crimsonhand with the **Mark of Lougmanta**.  
**550,698 XP** & **Scream of Pain** scroll

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Crimsonhand  
Crimsonhand sends you to **Tailor Weynia** (island near the lighthouse, south of Freeport) to craft new leggings. Collect the following:

1. **Poacher's Leggings** — Speak to Weynia on the dock. She needs:
   - **Pristine Snake Skin** — Kill **Sidewinder Snakes** west of Tailor Weynia  
   - **Pristine Sand Skipper Carapace** — Travel along the beach south of Freeport and farm Sand Skippers  
   - **Pristine Silk Bundle** — Kill **Gargantula** (northern ruins, mobs nearby con red)  
   - **Vulture Feathers** — Purchase from **Dteven Savis** (273 tunar) near FP west gate

Return to Tailor Weynia after collecting each item. Once finished, return the **Poacher's Leggings** to Crimsonhand.  
**883,791 XP** & **Leggings of Insight**, **Alarming Visage** scroll

---

# Level 20

**Quest NPC:** Malethai Crimsonhand  
Crimsonhand discovered the fake mark. Retrieve the real mark and deliver to **William Nothard** via **Azlynn**. Speak to **Wilkenson** at the docks about the real mark.

**The Troll:** Speak to **Madame Telina** northeast of Wilkenson. She believes the mark is held by a Troll, **Roj Eir Sew' Eil**, a Nasehir cutthroat. From the docks, travel southwest to locate him in the second Nasehir camp. Kill and loot the **Mark of Louoth**, return it to Telina.

**The Pirates:** Telina sends you south along the coast to **Muniel's Tea Garden**. Use a coach if possible. Search the island for skeleton pirates (lb → yel @20) and sand-covered chests. Retrieve **Chiseled Great Axe of Doom** and return to Telina.

**Waterlogged Treasure Chest:** Travel to the deep valley from FP coach via desert and gypsy village. Climb **Razor Back Fang**, avoid undead, locate the obelisk in the water, find the chest, and retrieve **Etched Helmet of Greatness**. Return to Telina.

**Reward:** **2,814,929 XP**  
Choose between:
- **Bloodwasp:** Decrease Drain HP by 300; increase 20% based on INT  
- **Shadow Tower:** Increase Hate by 750; Increase AC by 500 for 12 seconds (Self Only)
